design_system.name: Cybervoid OS
design_system.description: A high-contrast, deep-black interface with neon functional accents. Prioritizes battery life (AMOLED), visual hierarchy via luminance, and a 'hacker-chic' aesthetic.

scanlines.css: background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 2px, 3px 100%; pointer-events: none;

wallpapers.description: Neon signs illuminate a dark, urban alleyway at night.
Dark hallway with neon lights on the ceiling.
Black background with colorful lines of light.

Button.styles: rounded-none uppercase tracking-widest font-bold transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95

Card.styles: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-white/5 p-6 hover:border-white/20 transition-colors

Input.styles: bg-transparent border-b border-white/20 px-0 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-accent placeholder:text-white/30 rounded-none transition-colors

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid #000000 or subtle noise textures.
Use 'Unbounded' font for all headings (h1-h3). Use 'JetBrains Mono' for data/code.
All interactive elements must have a :hover state that increases brightness or adds a glow.
Sidebar must be fixed on the left, full height, with a distinct border-r border-white/10.
Theme customization (accent color) should use CSS variables (e.g., --accent-color).
Real-time chat messages should animate in from the bottom.
User profiles should display a 'Holo-Card' effect (glassmorphism + border glow).
File grid must support 'Bento' layout - mixing square and wide tiles.
Use 'sonner' for toast notifications with a dark, high-contrast theme.
Ensure text contrast is at least 4.5:1 against black backgrounds.
For image previews, use a full-screen modal with a backdrop blur.
Avoid rounded corners > 4px. Prefer sharp or slightly rounded (2px).
All interactive/key elements MUST include data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Setup Tailwind with the custom font families (Unbounded, JetBrains Mono).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Create a ThemeContext to handle the dynamic accent color and wallpaper changes.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Build the Sidebar component with Lucide icons.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Develop the File Grid with drag-and-drop upload zone (dashed border, neon glow on drag).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the Chat interface with WebSocket integration.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Create the Settings page for theme switching (colors: Red, Pink, Blue, Green, etc.).
